description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal container with a weathered, industrial appearance. The exterior is primarily composed of corrugated metal panels framed by a rust-colored metal border, giving it a rugged and utilitarian look. One end features a pair of large, flat metal doors with a central handle, suggesting access to the interior for storage or transport purposes. The sides and top display a ribbed, corrugated texture, likely for structural reinforcement and durability. The container shows signs of wear, such as scratches and discoloration, indicating prolonged outdoor use. Its robust construction and secure doors make it suitable for storing tools, equipment, or materials in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, weathered metal container with corrugated sides and sturdy double doors, framed by rust-colored metal. Designed for secure storage in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: The end view shows a solid, flat metal panel framed by rust-colored metal, with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the corrugated metal surface with two white horizontal reinforcements at the corners, emphasizing its industrial design.
description_view_2: The opposite end features two large, flat metal doors with a central handle, indicating the main access point to the container.
description_view_3: The other side view mirrors view 1, showing the corrugated metal surface and white corner reinforcements.
